hero.title: Car rental — fast and hassle-free
hero.subtitle: Choose a city and dates — we'll find the right car. Transparent prices, fair deposit and clear terms.

categories.title: Car categories
categories.subtitle: From economy city cars to premium class — we'll match your needs and budget.

popular.title: Popular cars
popular.subtitle: Frequently chosen by our clients. The full catalog with filters is on a separate page.

advantages.title: Why choose us
advantages.subtitle: Rental without surprises: fair terms and care for every client.
advantages.item1Text: The price is fixed in advance. No extra charges on pick-up.
advantages.item2Text: We'll prepare the car for the scheduled time at a convenient place.
advantages.item3Text: Regular maintenance and a check before every trip.
advantages.item4Text: We'll help you choose and answer questions before and during the rental.
advantages.item5Text: All rental terms and the deposit are stated transparently and in advance.

how.title: How to rent a car
how.subtitle: Just four simple steps from choice to the road.
how.step1Text: Enter the city and dates, pick a suitable car from the catalog.
how.step2Text: Fill in a short form — it takes less than a minute.
how.step3Text: A manager will contact you and confirm the booking.
how.step4Text: We'll prepare the car for the scheduled time at a convenient place.

terms.title: Rental terms
terms.subtitle: Basic requirements. Full terms are confirmed at booking.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Reach us in any convenient way — we'll reply and help you choose.
contacts.deliveryText: Delivery to the airport, train station or a specified address.
contacts.zoneValue: Odesa, car delivery across the city

finalCta.title: Ready to hit the road?
finalCta.subtitle: We'll match a car to your dates and budget. Submit a request and we'll contact you to confirm.

catalog.notFoundText: Try changing or resetting the filters.
catalog.searchAria: Search cars by city and dates

calculator.title: Preliminary calculation
calculator.subtitle: Demo calculation. The final price is confirmed by the manager.
calculator.note: The deposit is not included in the rental price and is returned after the car is handed back. The total is preliminary.
calculator.errorDates: Enter the pick-up and return date and time.
calculator.errorReturn: The return date and time must be later than the pick-up.

booking.formSubtitle: Leave your contacts — the manager will contact you and confirm the booking of {car}. Dates are taken from the calculation above.
booking.name: Name
booking.consent: I agree to the processing of personal data and to the rental terms.
booking.driverNote: The manager will confirm the driver service price.
booking.successText: We have received your request and will contact you to confirm.
booking.disclaimer: This is a request, not a confirmed booking. The deposit is not included in the rental price and is returned after the car is handed back.
booking.errorDates: Enter the pick-up and return date and time in the calculation block above.
booking.errorReturn: The return date must be later than the pick-up date.
booking.errorServer: Could not reach the server. Check your internet and try again.
booking.errorGeneric: Could not send the request. Check the details and try again.
